files.patch:
@@ -45,6 +45,7 @@ optional = [
     "algolia.search.read",
     "algolia.records.read",
     "algolia.records.write",
+    "algolia.records.delete",
 ]
 forbidden = [
     "system.exec",
@@ -101,7 +102,7 @@ related = ["algolia.search"]
 
 [provides.operations."algolia.records.delete"]
 description = "Delete a record"
-capability = "algolia.records.write"
+capability = "algolia.records.delete"
 risk_level = "high"
 safety_tier = "dangerous"
 requires_approval = "interactive"
@@ -308,8 +309,15 @@ window_ms = 60000
 burst = 10
 scope = "instance"
 
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "algolia.records.delete"
+requests = 50
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 10
+scope = "instance"
+
 [rate_limits.operation_pools]
 "algolia.records.get" = ["algolia.records.read"]
-"algolia.records.delete" = ["algolia.records.write"]
+"algolia.records.delete" = ["algolia.records.delete"]
 "algolia.indices.list" = ["algolia.indices.read"]
 "algolia.search" = ["algolia.search.read"]

@@ -48,6 +48,7 @@ optional = [
     "elasticsearch.cluster.read",
     "elasticsearch.search.read",
     "elasticsearch.indices.write",
+    "elasticsearch.indices.delete",
     "elasticsearch.indices.read",
 ]
 forbidden = [
@@ -308,7 +309,7 @@ related = ["elasticsearch.bulk"]
 
 [provides.operations."elasticsearch.indices.delete"]
 description = "Delete an index"
-capability = "elasticsearch.indices.write"
+capability = "elasticsearch.indices.delete"
 risk_level = "high"
 safety_tier = "dangerous"
 requires_approval = "interactive"
@@ -529,6 +530,13 @@ window_ms = 60000
 burst = 2
 scope = "instance"
 
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "elasticsearch.indices.delete"
+requests = 10
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 2
+scope = "instance"
+
 [[rate_limits.pools]]
 id = "elasticsearch.cluster.read"
 requests = 60
@@ -539,7 +547,7 @@ scope = "instance"
 [rate_limits.operation_pools]
 "elasticsearch.index_document" = ["elasticsearch.index.write"]
 "elasticsearch.cluster.health" = ["elasticsearch.cluster.read"]
-"elasticsearch.indices.delete" = ["elasticsearch.indices.write"]
+"elasticsearch.indices.delete" = ["elasticsearch.indices.delete"]
 "elasticsearch.bulk" = ["elasticsearch.index.write"]
 "elasticsearch.indices.list" = ["elasticsearch.indices.read"]
 "elasticsearch.get_document" = ["elasticsearch.search.read"]

@@ -45,6 +45,7 @@ optional = [
     "mailchimp.campaigns.write",
     "mailchimp.lists.read",
     "mailchimp.members.write",
+    "mailchimp.members.delete",
     "mailchimp.members.read",
 ]
 forbidden = [
@@ -193,7 +194,7 @@ related = [
 
 [provides.operations."mailchimp.members.delete"]
 description = "Permanently delete a member from an audience"
-capability = "mailchimp.members.write"
+capability = "mailchimp.members.delete"
 risk_level = "high"
 safety_tier = "dangerous"
 requires_approval = "interactive"
@@ -327,6 +328,13 @@ window_ms = 60000
 burst = 5
 scope = "instance"
 
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "mailchimp.members.delete"
+requests = 50
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 5
+scope = "instance"
+
 [[rate_limits.pools]]
 id = "mailchimp.campaigns.read"
 requests = 100
@@ -345,5 +353,5 @@ scope = "instance"
 "mailchimp.campaigns.list" = ["mailchimp.campaigns.read"]
 "mailchimp.campaigns.send" = ["mailchimp.campaigns.write"]
 "mailchimp.lists.list" = ["mailchimp.lists.read"]
-"mailchimp.members.delete" = ["mailchimp.members.write"]
+"mailchimp.members.delete" = ["mailchimp.members.delete"]
 "mailchimp.members.list" = ["mailchimp.members.read"]

@@ -43,6 +43,9 @@ required = [
 optional = [
     "sendgrid.contacts.write",
     "sendgrid.contacts.read",
+    "sendgrid.lists.read",
+    "sendgrid.lists.write",
+    "sendgrid.lists.delete",
     "sendgrid.mail.write",
     "sendgrid.stats.read",
     "sendgrid.templates.read",
@@ -54,30 +57,26 @@ forbidden = [
     "media.download",
 ]
 
-[provides.operations."sendgrid.contacts.delete"]
-description = "Delete marketing contacts"
-capability = "sendgrid.contacts.write"
+[provides.operations."sendgrid.lists.delete"]
+description = "Delete a marketing list"
+capability = "sendgrid.lists.delete"
 risk_level = "high"
 safety_tier = "dangerous"
 requires_approval = "interactive"
 idempotency = "strict"
 
-[provides.operations."sendgrid.contacts.delete".input_schema]
-required = ["ids"]
+[provides.operations."sendgrid.lists.delete".input_schema]
+required = ["list_id"]
 type = "object"
 
-[provides.operations."sendgrid.contacts.delete".input_schema.properties.ids]
-description = "Array of contact IDs to delete"
-type = "array"
+[provides.operations."sendgrid.lists.delete".input_schema.properties.list_id]
+description = "List UUID to delete"
+type = "string"
 
-[provides.operations."sendgrid.contacts.delete".output_schema]
-required = ["job_id"]
+[provides.operations."sendgrid.lists.delete".output_schema]
 type = "object"
 
-[provides.operations."sendgrid.contacts.delete".output_schema.properties.job_id]
-type = "string"
-
-[provides.operations."sendgrid.contacts.delete".network_constraints]
+[provides.operations."sendgrid.lists.delete".network_constraints]
 host_allow = ["api.sendgrid.com"]
 port_allow = [443]
 ip_allow = []
@@ -95,13 +94,13 @@ connect_timeout_ms = 10000
 total_timeout_ms = 30000
 max_response_bytes = 1048576
 
-[provides.operations."sendgrid.contacts.delete".ai_hints]
-when_to_use = "Delete marketing contacts. Cannot be undone."
+[provides.operations."sendgrid.lists.delete".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Delete a marketing list. Cannot be undone."
 common_mistakes = [
-    "Passing email addresses instead of SendGrid contact IDs.",
-    "Not realizing the delete is asynchronous — use the returned job_id to poll for completion status.",
+    "Deleting a list does not delete the contacts in it.",
+    "Using a list name instead of the SendGrid list UUID.",
 ]
-examples = ['{"ids": ["abc123", "def456"]}']
+examples = ['{"list_id": "list_abc123"}']
 related = ["sendgrid.contacts.list"]
 
 [provides.operations."sendgrid.contacts.list"]
@@ -148,7 +147,7 @@ common_mistakes = [
     "Confusing marketing contacts with transactional email recipients, which are separate in SendGrid.",
 ]
 examples = ["{}"]
-related = ["sendgrid.contacts.delete"]
+related = ["sendgrid.lists.delete"]
 
 [provides.operations."sendgrid.mail.send"]
 description = "Send an email"
@@ -352,6 +351,13 @@ window_ms = 60000
 burst = 5
 scope = "instance"
 
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "sendgrid.lists.delete"
+requests = 50
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 5
+scope = "instance"
+
 [[rate_limits.pools]]
 id = "sendgrid.templates.read"
 requests = 100
@@ -370,5 +376,5 @@ scope = "instance"
 "sendgrid.stats.get" = ["sendgrid.stats.read"]
 "sendgrid.contacts.list" = ["sendgrid.contacts.read"]
 "sendgrid.mail.send" = ["sendgrid.mail.write"]
-"sendgrid.contacts.delete" = ["sendgrid.contacts.write"]
+"sendgrid.lists.delete" = ["sendgrid.lists.delete"]
 "sendgrid.templates.list" = ["sendgrid.templates.read"]

@@ -46,6 +46,7 @@ required = [
 optional = [
     "todoist.projects.read",
     "todoist.tasks.write",
+    "todoist.tasks.delete",
     "todoist.tasks.read",
 ]
 forbidden = [
@@ -207,7 +208,7 @@ related = [
 
 [provides.operations."todoist.tasks.delete"]
 description = "Delete a task"
-capability = "todoist.tasks.write"
+capability = "todoist.tasks.delete"
 risk_level = "high"
 safety_tier = "dangerous"
 requires_approval = "interactive"
@@ -333,9 +334,16 @@ window_ms = 60000
 burst = 10
 scope = "instance"
 
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "todoist.tasks.delete"
+requests = 50
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 10
+scope = "instance"
+
 [rate_limits.operation_pools]
 "todoist.tasks.create" = ["todoist.tasks.write"]
 "todoist.tasks.complete" = ["todoist.tasks.write"]
 "todoist.projects.list" = ["todoist.projects.read"]
-"todoist.tasks.delete" = ["todoist.tasks.write"]
+"todoist.tasks.delete" = ["todoist.tasks.delete"]
 "todoist.tasks.list" = ["todoist.tasks.read"]

@@ -46,6 +46,7 @@ required = [
 optional = [
     "trello.boards.read",
     "trello.cards.write",
+    "trello.cards.delete",
     "trello.cards.read",
 ]
 forbidden = [
@@ -162,7 +163,7 @@ related = [
 
 [provides.operations."trello.cards.delete"]
 description = "Delete a card"
-capability = "trello.cards.write"
+capability = "trello.cards.delete"
 risk_level = "high"
 safety_tier = "dangerous"
 requires_approval = "interactive"
@@ -337,9 +338,16 @@ window_ms = 60000
 burst = 10
 scope = "instance"
 
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "trello.cards.delete"
+requests = 100
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 10
+scope = "instance"
+
 [rate_limits.operation_pools]
 "trello.cards.list" = ["trello.cards.read"]
 "trello.lists.get" = ["trello.boards.read"]
-"trello.cards.delete" = ["trello.cards.write"]
+"trello.cards.delete" = ["trello.cards.delete"]
 "trello.boards.list" = ["trello.boards.read"]
 "trello.cards.create" = ["trello.cards.write"]
